metadata.title: IPA to Pink Trombone heuristic parameter map
metadata.important_warning: This is not an official or acoustically calibrated IPA-to-Pink-Trombone dictionary. The IPA is a phonetic notation system, not a numeric synthesizer parameter space. Pink Trombone is a simplified articulatory synthesizer, so many IPA contrasts are approximate or unsupported.
recommended_pipeline: 1. Parse IPA into base symbols + combining diacritics + tie-bar sequences.
2. Map each base symbol to articulatory features: place, manner, voicing, height, backness, rounding, nasalization.
3. Convert features to Pink Trombone controls: Glottis values, tongueIndex, tongueDiameter, constriction index/diameter, velumTarget, turbulence, release transients.
4. Apply diacritic patches as transformations over the base mapping.
5. Smooth transitions between adjacent phones for coarticulation; do not jump directly between target values.
6. Calibrate by ear or by optimizing against recorded reference audio/formants.

pink_trombone_control_notes.glottis: Maps to Glottis.UIFrequency, Glottis.UITenseness, intensity/loudness-style values.
pink_trombone_control_notes.tract: Maps to TractUI.tongueIndex/tongueDiameter and to Tract.targetDiameter constrictions.
pink_trombone_control_notes.velum: Maps to Tract.velumTarget; 0.01 means oral, about 0.4 means nasal.

palatal.pt_anchor: approximated from high front vowel/tongue region

sources.name: IMAGINARY/pink-trombone index.html
sources.used_for: Glottis/Tract controls and built-in vowel/consonant visual anchors

sources.name: International Phonetic Association IPA chart
sources.used_for: IPA symbol inventory and feature categories

schema.symbol: IPA symbol or composed IPA sequence
schema.pink_trombone.tract.lip_diameter: Non-native helper; implement by setting front/lip constriction target diameter near index 41
schema.pink_trombone.tract.constrictions: One or more target constrictions; implement by modifying Tract.targetDiameter around the index with the width
schema.pink_trombone.excitation.turbulence_nois: Approximate frication/noise amount passed to Tract.runStep
schema.pink_trombone.excitation.release_transie: Whether to call/add a release transient after closure

d̪.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER D + COMBINING BRIDGE BELOW
notes: Composed from base symbol plus dental diacritic.

d͡z.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER D + COMBINING DOUBLE INVERTED BREVE + LATIN SMALL LETTER Z
notes: Affricates are normally written as sequences joined by a tie bar; mapped as a two-stage segment.

d͡ɮ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER D + COMBINING DOUBLE INVERTED BREVE + LATIN SMALL LETTER LEZH
notes: Affricates are normally written as sequences joined by a tie bar; mapped as a two-stage segment.
Lateral affrication is approximated; no lateral channel exists.

d͡ʑ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER D + COMBINING DOUBLE INVERTED BREVE + LATIN SMALL LETTER Z WITH CURL
notes: Affricates are normally written as sequences joined by a tie bar; mapped as a two-stage segment.

d͡ʒ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER D + COMBINING DOUBLE INVERTED BREVE + LATIN SMALL LETTER EZH
notes: Affricates are normally written as sequences joined by a tie bar; mapped as a two-stage segment.
Anchored to Pink Trombone label e near index 20, diameter 3.5.
Anchored to Pink Trombone label i near index 27.4, diameter 2.315.

kʼ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER K + MODIFIER LETTER APOSTROPHE
notes: Ejective glottalic egressive airflow is not natively modeled; mapped as voiceless constriction plus sharper release/high burst.
No true lateral airflow; approximated by a looser central constriction.

l̪.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER L + COMBINING BRIDGE BELOW
notes: Composed from base symbol plus dental diacritic.
No true lateral airflow; approximated by a looser central constriction.

n̪.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER N + COMBINING BRIDGE BELOW
notes: Composed from base symbol plus dental diacritic.

pʼ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER P + MODIFIER LETTER APOSTROPHE
notes: Ejective glottalic egressive airflow is not natively modeled; mapped as voiceless constriction plus sharper release/high burst.

qʼ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER Q + MODIFIER LETTER APOSTROPHE
notes: Ejective glottalic egressive airflow is not natively modeled; mapped as voiceless constriction plus sharper release/high burst.
Pink Trombone has no explicit trill oscillator; approximated as repeated brief closures.

sʼ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER S + MODIFIER LETTER APOSTROPHE
notes: Ejective glottalic egressive airflow is not natively modeled; mapped as voiceless constriction plus sharper release/high burst.

tʼ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER T + MODIFIER LETTER APOSTROPHE
notes: Ejective glottalic egressive airflow is not natively modeled; mapped as voiceless constriction plus sharper release/high burst.

t̪.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER T + COMBINING BRIDGE BELOW
notes: Composed from base symbol plus dental diacritic.

t͡s.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER T + COMBINING DOUBLE INVERTED BREVE + LATIN SMALL LETTER S
notes: Affricates are normally written as sequences joined by a tie bar; mapped as a two-stage segment.

t͡ɕ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER T + COMBINING DOUBLE INVERTED BREVE + LATIN SMALL LETTER C WITH CURL
notes: Affricates are normally written as sequences joined by a tie bar; mapped as a two-stage segment.

t͡ɬ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER T + COMBINING DOUBLE INVERTED BREVE + LATIN SMALL LETTER L WITH BELT
notes: Affricates are normally written as sequences joined by a tie bar; mapped as a two-stage segment.
Lateral affrication is approximated; no lateral channel exists.

t͡ʃ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER T + COMBINING DOUBLE INVERTED BREVE + LATIN SMALL LETTER ESH
notes: Affricates are normally written as sequences joined by a tie bar; mapped as a two-stage segment.
Anchored to Pink Trombone label (u) near index 23, diameter 2.15.
Uses /i/ tongue with lip rounding.
Anchored to Pink Trombone label æ near index 15, diameter 2.9.

ç.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER C WITH CEDILLA

ø.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER O WITH STROKE

ħ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER H WITH STROKE

notes: Clicks require lingual ingressive airstream; Pink Trombone does not natively model this.
Clicks require lingual ingressive airstream; Pink Trombone does not natively model this.
Lateral release is not modeled.
Clicks require lingual ingressive airstream; Pink Trombone does not natively model this.
Clicks require lingual ingressive airstream; Pink Trombone does not natively model this.
Anchored to Pink Trombone label ɑ near index 13, diameter 2.405.
Anchored to Pink Trombone label ɒ near index 12, diameter 2.0.

ɓ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER B WITH HOOK
notes: Implosive glottalic ingressive airflow is not modeled by Pink Trombone; mapped as a voiced stop with low-pressure onset.
Anchored to Pink Trombone label (ɔ) near index 17.7, diameter 2.075.

ɕ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER C WITH CURL

ɖ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER D WITH TAIL

ɖ͡ʐ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER D WITH TAIL + COMBINING DOUBLE INVERTED BREVE + LATIN SMALL LETTER Z WITH RETROFLEX HOOK
notes: Affricates are normally written as sequences joined by a tie bar; mapped as a two-stage segment.

ɗ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER D WITH HOOK
notes: Implosive glottalic ingressive airflow is not modeled by Pink Trombone; mapped as a voiced stop with low-pressure onset.
Anchored to Pink Trombone label ə near index 21, diameter 2.9.

ɚ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER SCHWA WITH HOOK
notes: Not a core IPA chart vowel; approximates rhoticity by slightly retracted central schwa.

ɜ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER REVERSED OPEN E
notes: Pink Trombone comment says the ə marker should be ɜ.

ɝ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER REVERSED OPEN E WITH HOOK
notes: Not a core IPA chart vowel; approximates rhoticity by slightly retracted central vowel.

ɞ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER CLOSED REVERSED OPEN E

ɟ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER DOTLESS J WITH STROKE

ɠ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER G WITH HOOK
notes: Implosive glottalic ingressive airflow is not modeled by Pink Trombone; mapped as a voiced stop with low-pressure onset.

ɦ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER H WITH HOOK

ɧ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER HENG WITH HOOK
notes: IPA ɧ is language-specific; this approximates simultaneous postalveolar + velar frication.

ɨ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER I WITH STROKE

notes: Anchored to Pink Trombone label ɪ near index 27, diameter 2.975.

ɬ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER L WITH BELT
notes: Pink Trombone is essentially 1-D and has no true lateral channel; this uses a central constriction approximation.

ɭ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER L WITH RETROFLEX HOOK
notes: No true lateral airflow; approximated by a looser central constriction.
Pink Trombone is essentially 1-D and has no true lateral channel; this uses a central constriction approximation.

ɱ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER M WITH HOOK

ɳ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER N WITH RETROFLEX HOOK

ɺ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER TURNED R WITH LONG LEG
notes: No true lateral flap; approximated as a brief central flap.

ɻ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER TURNED R WITH HOOK

ɽ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER R WITH TAIL

notes: Pink Trombone has no explicit trill oscillator; approximated as repeated brief closures.

ʋ.unicode_name: LATIN SMALL LETTER V WITH HOOK

No true lateral airflow; approximated by a looser central constriction.
